stemHtml:
You are departing for a flight with a planned landing fuel of 1800 kg. According to aircraft limitations, the centre tank fuel must be used prior to the wing tanks fuel.

Given the following information, the location of the CG on landing will be how many metres aft of the datum ?

Maximum Take-Off mass: 99 800 kg
Actual Take-Off Mass: 59 500 kg
Take-off CG location: 16.26 m aft of the datum
Fuel in centre tank at take-off: 10 000 kg
Fuel wing tanks at take-off: 18 000 kg
Centre fuel tank centroid: 15.38 m aft of the datum
Wing fuel tank centroid: 17.79 m aft of the datum
